rationale: Section 11.211 governs exemptions for real property leased to certain schools. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Section 11.13(b). No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The portion of real property that is leased to an independent school district, community college district, or open-enrollment charter school authorized by Subchapter C, D, or E, Chapter 12, Education Code, is qualified and exempt from taxation pursuant to Sections 11.11 and 11.21 of this code
_note: No conflict; §11.211 and §11.13(b) address distinct exemption categories.
